content: (The location is now Solitude.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Serana, Solitude Guard, Noster Eagle-Eye, Minette Vinius, Rorlund) (Lydia has entered combat with Serana) (Serana hit MJR with Dwarven Mace) (Frea has entered combat with Serana) (Frea equipped Ebonyflesh) (Frea is no longer in combat) (Serana hit Lydia with Dwarven Mace) (Lydia is no longer in combat)

Lydia: That bloodsucking whore Serana just struck my Thane with her filthy mace—I'll cleave her head from her shoulders next time she shows her fangs near MJR, Dibella witness it! Frea: Easy, Lydia, the All-Maker's winds have stilled the clash for now, but that vampire's strike carries Miraak's chill... we press on through Solitude's stones before her shadows draw more trouble from these clear skies. Jawanan: By the gods, what's this brawl in broad daylight? You lot look like you've tangled with a draugr horde—I'm Jawanan, fletcher's apprentice here in Solitude, and that commotion nearly warped my fresh yew shafts!

Lydia: Aye, Jawanan, that vampire's got fangs sharper than a skeever's, but my steel's quicker—Dibella grant me the chance to prove it without these guards nosing in. The sun's high over Solitude's walls today; feels like a sign to move on before more trouble brews. Frea: The fight's ebbed like Solstheim's tides, but Miraak's chill still lingers on that blade's edge... good to meet you, Jawanan, a fletcher's craft sounds steadier than our wandering paths. These clear skies over the courtyard mock the shadows we fled; let's keep our wards sharp amid the stones. Jawanan: No harm meant, ladies—fletching's my trade at The Fletcher, keeps me from the wars and dragons alike. That scuffle's got the whole plaza buzzing like a hive; best we all catch our breath here by the bridge before the Jarl's men come marching.

(*You are observing the following:* In the scene, a vast, rugged landscape unfolds under a bright, high midday sun casting long shadows across uneven terrain. Towering stone walls of an ancient fortified city rise prominently in the distance, their weathered gray surfaces etched with battle scars and topped with crenellations. A sturdy stone bridge arches over a misty chasm or river below, flanked by sheer cliffs and scattered boulders. The foreground reveals a winding dirt path leading toward the bridge, dotted with patches of sparse grass and wildflowers swaying in a gentle breeze. Ethereal mist clings to the lower ground, while distant peaks of jagged mountains pierce a clear blue sky, hinting at untamed wilderness beyond the city's borders. Subtle details include faint silhouettes of armored figures patrolling the walls and bridge, their forms blurred by haze, and an overarching sense of epic scale, as if epic conflicts involving mythical beasts loom just out of sight. Overlapping the view are translucent overlays of archaic script and symbols, resembling fragmented journal entries or incantations:) (*You are observing the following:* In this scene, viewed from a first-person perspective, a cobblestone pathway stretches ahead through a narrow, open-air alleyway flanked by weathered stone walls and multi-story buildings made of rough-hewn masonry and timber. The architecture suggests a medieval European style, with arched doorways, wooden beams, and patches of moss or decay on the surfaces. A clear blue sky looms overhead, casting natural daylight that illuminates the area without harsh shadows. Directly in front are two figures standing close together on the path. The nearer one is a tall, athletic woman with long, flowing blonde hair cascading down her back. She appears nude except for minimal adornments: thin golden chains draped across her torso and hips, forming a sparse, jewelry-like covering; leather armbands and bracers on her upper arms and wrists; and sturdy fur-trimmed boots reaching mid-calf. Her skin is fair, and she stands confidently facing the viewer, her posture relaxed yet poised, with one hand resting near her hip. Behind her, partially obscured, is a broader-shouldered man with dark skin, dressed in rugged leather and fur armor that includes a tunic, pants, and boots suitable for travel or combat.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Serana, Solitude Guard, Viarmo, Noster Eagle-Eye, Minette Vinius) (MJR cast the spell / consumed Flames) (MJR cast the spell / consumed Frostbite) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Serana, Noster Eagle-Eye, Vivienne Onis, Viarmo, Solitude Guard) (Serana hit MJR with Dwarven Mace) (Frea has entered combat with Serana) (Frea is no longer in combat)
